_comment: v2 seeded REST payload template for gold ValueSets (flexfield value set VALUES). Not a loadable file: value set VALUES are created one-per-POST via the Fusion REST API, not via an FBDI/FBL file. This documents the exact request bodies the harness (harness/load_rest_vsv.py) sends to POST /fscmRestApi/resources/11.13.18.05/valueSets/{ValueSetCode}/child/values. Unlike v1 (which DISCOVERED an editable value set at load time), v2 HARD-CODES the value set to FA_MAJOR_CATEGORY -- a standard Oracle Fusion Fixed Assets seeded-configuration value set (created_by FIN_IMPL in the demo image, MaximumSize=20, independent, not protected/secured) that ships on every fa-esew-devN-saasfademo1 demo pod and accepts REST value writes. ${VS_CODE}=FA_MAJOR_CATEGORY (URL-encoded into the path); ${PREFIX} is the fresh numeric run prefix stamped on the NEW value codes only.

values.Description: DMT gold bad value ${PREFIX} exceeds MaximumSize -> HTTP 400 FND-2825
